title: Rainbow Glint
description: Adds a more saturated rainbow glint to enchanted items
body:
This resource pack makes your enchantment glint have a more saturated rainbow effect that is a good middle ground for other rainbow enchantment glints I have found. Its also made for the latest version.

You can see a video of the glint effect [HERE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i1JLyKHYJlk)

You can make your own enchantment glint [HERE](https://mcglint.com/glint)
